mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.content_text, a.content_storage_type, a.content_object_key, a.content_url, a.content_format, a.content_preview, a.cover_url, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.summary_status, a.summary_text, a.created_at, a.updated_at, up.nickname AS author_nickname, up.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url FROM user_inbox ui INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = ui.article_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = a.author_id WHERE ui.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY ui.published_at DESC, ui.article_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inbox ui INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = ui.article_id WHERE ui.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1
